libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property appears necessary. Tests should account for the 2.0.0-M1 artifact contents: org.apache.pekko.http.ccompat classes are absent, so coverage should focus on org.apache.pekko.macros.LogHelper and LogHelperMacro rather than the old ccompat annotations.

deterministic_setup.reason: LogHelper exposes org.apache.pekko.event.LoggingAdapter and uses Pekko annotations from the actor module; the dependency is provided in the artifact POM and is not pulled transitively.
LogHelperMacro uses scala.reflect.macros.blackbox; scala-reflect is provided in the artifact POM and should match the Scala 2.13.18 version used by pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8878 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.3.0 tests reference org.apache.pekko.http.ccompat, which is not present in 2.0.0-M1 and must not be treated as a setup problem.
Mixing pekko-actor 1.x or scala-reflect 2.13.17 with pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1 may compile or runtime-fail due to version mismatch.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: pekko-parsing_2.13 is an internal Scala macro/support artifact. In 2.0.0-M1 it only contains org.apache.pekko.macros classes, and its POM marks pekko-actor_2.13 and scala-reflect as provided, so meaningful LogHelper/LogHelperMacro coverage needs those test dependencies available explicitly.
